figures.caption: FIG. 2. The Aslamazov-Larkin diagram for the fluctuational conductivity. Solid red lines are electron Green’s functions, blue lines are Majorana Green’s functions, black circles are current vertices, and dotted black lines are fluctuational propagators.

FIG. 3. (a) The hyperoctagon lattice, which has a bodycentered cubic (BCC) structure formed by interpenetrating square and octagonal spirals, with a four-atom unit cell [17]. The frustrated orbital interactions are denoted by color-coded red, blue, and green bonds. (b) In the CPT model each site is trivalent, hosting conduction electrons (linked by golden bonds), localized spins, and localized orbitals (linked by colorcoded orbital interactions). The frustrated orbital interactions induce a Majorana fractionalization of the spins, which are then Kondo-coupled to the conduction electrons on the same lattice.
